question: Will Anthropic overtake OpenAI in revenue in 2026?
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve as Yes if, at any time before January 1, 2027, public company reports or other credible sources indicate that Anthropic’s annualized revenue (or revenue run-rate) exceeds OpenAI’s annualized revenue (or revenue run-rate).
background:
Anthropic and OpenAI are two of the leading AI model developers, seeing very rapid revenue growth driven by API sales, enterprise contracts, and subscriptions.

As of January 2026, [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/openai-cfo-says-annualized-revenue-crosses-20-billion-2025-2026-01-19/) reported that OpenAI’s CFO said the company’s annualized revenue had surpassed \$20 billion in 2025. [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/technology/openai-tops-25-billion-annualized-revenue-last-month-information-reports-2026-03-05/?utm_source=chatgpt.com) later reported that OpenAI had topped \$25 billion in annualized revenue as of February 2026, while Anthropic was at roughly \$9 billion in annualized revenue at that time.

Separately, [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-raises-30-billion-series-g-funding-380-billion-post-money-valuation?utm_source=chatgpt.com) announced in February 2026 that its own run-rate revenue had reached \$14 billion. [EpochAI forecasts](https://epoch.ai/data-insights/anthropic-openai-revenue#:~:text=Anthropic's%20annualized%20revenue%20has%20been,of%207%C3%97%20per%20year.https://epoch.ai/data-insights/anthropic-openai-revenue#:~:text=Anthropic's%20annualized%20revenue%20has%20been,of%207%C3%97%20per%20year.) that Anthropic could overtake OpenAI in annualized revenue by May 2026.
